THEWICKEN-BREW.title: Brew
THEWICKEN-EXTRACT_ESSENCE.title: Extract Essence
THEWICKEN-EXTRACT_ESSENCE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. On unblocked damage, extract a [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWICKEN-STRIKE_WICKEN.title: Strike
THEWICKEN-DEFEND_WICKEN.title: Defend
THEWICKEN-OWL_FAMILIAR.description: Summon an [gold]Owl Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Wisdom[/gold] to your hand.

THEWICKEN-CAT_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Cat Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Ferocity[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-CAT_FAMILIAR.title: Cat Familiar
THEWICKEN-FEROCITY.title: Ferocity
THEWICKEN-FERTILIZE.title: Fertilize
THEWICKEN-FERTILIZE.description: Gain {BramblesPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold]. Upgrade {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your hand.
THEWICKEN-LAVENDER_AND_SAGE.title: Lavender and Sage
THEWICKEN-NETTLES.title: Nettles
THEWICKEN-NETTLES.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies, plus 1 for each [gold]Bramble[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLEBURST.title: Brambleburst
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLEBURST.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Bramble[/gold], then lose all [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWICKEN-WILD_GROWTH.title: Wild Growth
THEWICKEN-NEEDLE_WHIP.title: Needle Whip
THEWICKEN-NEEDLE_WHIP.description: Lose all [gold]Brambles[/gold]. ALL enemies lose that much [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
THEWICKEN-FORBIDDEN_MAGIC.title: Forbidden Magic
THEWICKEN-STUCK_IN_THE_BUSH.title: Stuck in the Bush
THEWICKEN-MOONDROP_TEA.title: Moondrop Tea
THEWICKEN-SOMETHING_WICKED.title: Something Wicked
THEWICKEN-TOIL_AND_TROUBLE.title: Toil and Trouble
THEWICKEN-RATTLING_BOTTLES.title: Rattling Bottles
THEWICKEN-RATTLING_BOTTLES.description: Fill your empty potion slots with [gold]Rocks[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BAG_OF_TEETH.title: Bag of Teeth
THEWICKEN-HIDDEN_IN_SMOKE.title: Hidden in Smoke
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLE_SHIELD.title: Bramble Shield
THEWICKEN-BRAMBLE_SHIELD.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain {PerBramble:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each [gold]Bramble[/gold] created this turn.
THEWICKEN-VICIOUS_BARBS.title: Vicious Barbs
THEWICKEN-HEDGE_PRISON.title: Hedge Prison
THEWICKEN-ROTTING_ROOTS.title: Rotting Roots
THEWICKEN-CURSED_BLOODLINE.title: Cursed Bloodline
THEWICKEN-BIND_IN_BLOOD.title: Bind in Blood
THEWICKEN-BIND_IN_BLOOD.description: This turn, gain {BindInBloodPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold] for each life lost.
THEWICKEN-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.title: Bottomless Cauldron
THEWICKEN-BOTTOMLESS_CAULDRON.descriptio: Whenever you use a potion, create a [gold]Wicked Brew[/gold].
THEWICKEN-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.title: Cloak of Moonlight
THEWICKEN-CLOAK_OF_MOONLIGHT.description: Whenever you create a card or potion, gain {CloakOfMoonlightPower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BOTTLE_WALL.title: Bottle Wall
THEWICKEN-BOTTLE_WALL.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Gain {PerPotion:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each potion used this turn.
THEWICKEN-HERBAL_REMEDY.title: Herbal Remedy
THEWICKEN-HERBAL_REMEDY.description: Destroy all of your potions. Draw {Cards:diff()} and gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for each.
THEWICKEN-UNSTABLE_REACTION.title: Unstable Reaction
THEWICKEN-UNSTABLE_REACTION.description: Destroy all of your potions. Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies for each.
THEWICKEN-DANCE_AROUND_THE_CAULDRON.desc: Whenever you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] this turn, make a [gold]Wicked Brew[/gold].
THEWICKEN-ROOTCRAFT.title: Rootcraft
THEWICKEN-ROOTCRAFT.description: Whenever you upgrade a card in your hand, gain {BramblesPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold].
THEWICKEN-ROOMY_SATCHEL.title: Roomy Satchel
THEWICKEN-PLAGUE.title: Plague
THEWICKEN-PLAGUE.description: Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. You and ALL enemies lose {StrengthLoss:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
THEWICKEN-QUILLS.title: Quills
THEWICKEN-HIBERNATE.title: Hibernate
THEWICKEN-MUTILATE.title: Mutilate
THEWICKEN-SCOUT.title: Scout
THEWICKEN-LAZE.title: Laze
THEWICKEN-RATS.title: Rats
THEWICKEN-RAT_FAMILIAR.title: Rat Familiar
THEWICKEN-RAT_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Rat Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Plague[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-PORCUPINE_FAMILIAR.title: Porcupine Familiar
THEWICKEN-PORCUPINE_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Porcupine Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Quills[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-BEAR_FAMILIAR.title: Bear Familiar
THEWICKEN-BEAR_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Bear Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Hibernate[/gold] or [gold]Mutilate[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-CROW_FAMILIAR.title: Crow Familiar
THEWICKEN-CROW_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Crow Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Scout[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-SLOTH_FAMILIAR.title: Sloth Familiar
THEWICKEN-SLOTH_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Sloth Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Laze[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-POCKET_RATS.title: Pocket Rats
THEWICKEN-BROOM_STRIKE.title: Broom Strike
THEWICKEN-BROOM_STRIKE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. The next [gold]Familiar[/gold] power you play costs 0.
THEWICKEN-PILLAGE.title: Pillage
THEWICKEN-PILLAGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw a card for each of your [gold]Familiars[/gold].
THEWICKEN-STAMPEDE.title: Stampede
THEWICKEN-STAMPEDE.description: Each of your [gold]Familiars[/gold] deals {Damage:diff()} damage to the enemy.
THEWICKEN-RITUAL_SACRIFICE.title: Ritual Sacrifice
THEWICKEN-GNASH.title: Gnash
THEWICKEN-GNASH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage, plus 5 for each [gold]Gnash[/gold] played this combat.
THEWICKEN-WOLF_FAMILIAR.title: Wolf Familiar
THEWICKEN-WOLF_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Wolf Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a [gold]Gnash[/gold] to your hand.
THEWICKEN-CACKLE.title: Cackle
THEWICKEN-WEATHERED_WITCH_HAT.title: Weathered Witch Hat
THEWICKEN-WEATHERED_WITCH_HAT.descriptio: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. The next [gold]Skill[/gold] you play costs 1.
THEWICKEN-WOE_AND_WHIMSY.title: Woe and Whimsy
THEWICKEN-WOE_AND_WHIMSY.description: Add a random [gold]Familiar[/gold] card to your hand.{IfUpgraded:show: It is [gold]Upgraded[/gold].|}
THEWICKEN-CHIMERA_FAMILIAR.title: Chimera Familiar
THEWICKEN-CHIMERA_FAMILIAR.description: Summon a [gold]Chimera Familiar[/gold]. At the start of your turn, add a random [gold]Familiar[/gold] card to your hand.
THEWICKEN-FIND_FAMILIAR.title: Find Familiar
THEWICKEN-FIND_FAMILIAR.description: Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Familiar[/gold] {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your draw or discard pile to your hand.
THEWICKEN-PACT_OF_BEASTS.title: Pact of Beasts
THEWICKEN-PACT_OF_BEASTS.description: Put all [gold]Familiar[/gold] cards from your draw and discard piles into your hand.
THEWICKEN-EMBRACE_THE_WILDS.title: Embrace the Wilds
THEWICKEN-EMBRACE_THE_WILDS.description: Transform all cards in your hand into random [gold]Familiar[/gold] powers. They cost 0 this combat.
THEWICKEN-CIRCLE_OF_ROT.title: Circle of Rot
THEWICKEN-CIRCLE_OF_ROT.description: You and your allies gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold]. Apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THEWICKEN-CREEPING_VINES.title: Creeping Vines
THEWICKEN-CREEPING_VINES.description: Apply {BramblesPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold] to a random ally [b]X[/b] times.
THEWICKEN-SHARE_THE_BREW.title: Share the Brew
THEWICKEN-SHARE_THE_BREW.description: You and your allies each gain a random [gold]Potion[/gold].
THEWICKEN-BOTTLE_BARRAGE.title: Bottle Barrage
THEWICKEN-BOTTLE_BARRAGE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each [gold]Potion[/gold] created this combat.
THEWICKEN-GATHER_HERBS.title: Gather Herbs
THEWICKEN-DOUBLE_DOUBLE.title: Double, Double
THEWICKEN-DOUBLE_DOUBLE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage twice. When you use your next [gold]Potion[/gold] this turn, add a copy of it to your belt.
THEWICKEN-AMBUSH.title: Ambush!
THEWICKEN-AMBUSH.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. Summon a random [gold]Familiar[/gold].
THEWICKEN-A_LITTLE_SIP.title: A Little Sip
THEWICKEN-A_LITTLE_SIP.description: Whenever you use a [gold]Potion[/gold], heal {ALittleSipPower:diff()} HP.
THEWICKEN-PACT_OF_AGONY.title: Pact of Agony
THEWICKEN-PACT_OF_FURY.title: Pact of Fury
THEWICKEN-FAVORITE_SPELLBOOK.title: Favorite Spellbook
THEWICKEN-FAVORITE_SPELLBOOK.description: Gain {BramblesPower:diff()} [gold]Brambles[/gold]. Draw {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards}. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Create a [gold]Wicked Brew[/gold].
THEWICKEN-LIGHT_THE_CANDLE.title: Light the Candle
THEWICKEN-LIGHT_THE_CANDLE.description: Upgrade {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:card|cards} in your hand. Create a [gold]Vial of Smoke[/gold].
THEWICKEN-WITCHCRAFT.title: Witchcraft
THEWICKEN-CURSED_BOTTLES.title: Cursed Bottles
